zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm Drummond於1415年7月14日出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安斯托比爾時，他的父親Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall25歲，母親Margaret Ruthven16歲。他於1429年7月14日與Marion Mariot Murray在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm Drummond于1415年7月14日出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安斯托比爾时，他的父亲Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall25岁，母亲Margaret Ruthven16岁。他于1429年7月14日与Marion Mariot Murray在英国苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm Drummond was born on 14 July 1415, in Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Ruthven, was 16. He married Marion Mariot Murray on 14 July 1429, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1470, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 55.

fr.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm Drummond est né le 14 juillet 1415, à Stobhill, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ruthven, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Marion Mariot Murray le 14 juillet 1429, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1470, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: Perth, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm Drummond am 14. Juli 1415 in Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Ruthven 16. Er hat am 14. Juli 1429 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Marion Mariot Murray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland.

Lui sposato Marion Mariot Murray il 14 luglio 1429, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. ko.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 퍼스
ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm Drummond(이)가 1415년 7월 14일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 스토브힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Ruthven(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1429년 7월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Marion Mariot Murray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland: пирт, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm Drummond родился 14 июля 1415 г. в местности стобхилл, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ruthven, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Mariot Murray 14 июля 1429 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1470 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет.
